CustomField.formula:
IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "NA Enterprise"), "NA Enterprise;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "NA Inside Sales"), "NA Inside Sales;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "LATAM Inside Sales"), "LATAM Inside Sales;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "UK Enterprise"), "UK Enterprise;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "EMEA Inside Sales B2B Hybrid"), "EMEA Inside Sales B2B Hybrid;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "EMEA Inside Sales Russia"), "EMEA Inside Sales Russia;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "EMEA Inside Sales SMB"), "EMEA Inside Sales SMB;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "EMEA Inside Sales ENT"), "EMEA Inside Sales ENT;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "Agencies Independent EMEA"), "Agencies Independent EMEA;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "APAC Inside Sales SMB"), "APAC Inside Sales SMB;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "APAC Inside Sales ENT"), "APAC Inside Sales ENT;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "APAC China SMB"), "APAC China SMB;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "APAC China ENT"), "APAC China ENT;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "APAC Japan Enterprise"), "APAC Japan Enterprise;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "APAC Japan SMB"), "APAC Japan SMB;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "NA Inside Sales B2B"), "NA Inside Sales B2B;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "France Enterprise"), "France Enterprise;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "Investors"), "Investors;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "OEM"), "OEM;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "UK Enterprise"), "UK Enterprise;", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Sub_Division__c, "Dach Enterprise"), "Dach Enterprise;", "")
/* +":"+text(SW_Industry__c)+":"+text(Industry_Subtype__c) */
CustomField.label: Territory Evaluation Formula
